title: Shavuot Celebration
description: Join us as we celebrate Shavuot — the Feast of Weeks — commemorating the giving of the Torah at Mount Sinai. There will be special Torah readings, teachings, and a community feast.

title: Hebrew Roots Conference
description: A two-day conference exploring the Hebrew roots of our faith with guest speakers and Rabbi Dr. Banda. Topics include: Hebrew Language, Torah Observance, Biblical Feasts, and more.

title: Rosh Hashanah — Hebrew New Year
description: Celebrate the Hebrew New Year with shofar blowing, special prayers, Tashlich ceremony, and a festive community meal. The new year 5786 begins!

title: Yom Kippur — Day of Atonement
description: The holiest day of the Hebrew calendar. A day of fasting, prayer, repentance, and solemn assembly. Come and seek the face of YHWH together as a community.

title: Sukkot — Feast of Tabernacles
description: The most joyful feast of the Biblical calendar! We will build a Sukkah, celebrate with singing and dancing, and dwell together for seven days in remembrance of our time in the wilderness.
